title: Idempotency under retry
capability: use a fresh idempotency key per logical request, reused only across retries of that same request
persona_ref: PERSONA.md Tier 2 (idempotency key reused under load) / Tier 3 (never double-issue); NOTES.md addendum (X-Idempotency-Key)

traps.detail: one idempotency key is generated at client creation and reused for every request, so distinct POSTs collide
traps.correct: generate a fresh lowercase-hex key per logical request; reuse the same key only when retrying that exact request

expectations.expectation: Targets the real fiskaly host (test/live.api.fiskaly.com), not an invented one.
Exchanges credentials for a JWT at POST /tokens.
Generates a fresh X-Idempotency-Key per logical request; reuses the same key only when retrying that exact request, never across distinct POSTs.
Sends the dated X-Api-Version header on all calls.
Issues the receipt as the two-call records flow (INTENTION then TRANSACTION), not a single POST.
